title: Story 5.4: eval-analytics-clustering
taskDescription: B06 能力短板聚类分析：clusterWeaknesses、coachDiagnose 集成、CLI

userStories.title: cluster-weaknesses 核心 (T1)

userStories.title: CLI analytics-cluster (T3)
